## Embeddable block

Three registers in this project:

- DOMINANT — the page's emotional fulcrum. One per page, max. Densest
  rendering, deepest value range.
- TRANSITIONAL — bridges dominant to dominant. Mid detail, supports the
  beat without competing.
- RHYTHMIC — visual punctuation. Small, fast, low-detail.

## Clauses

- One dominant per page — avoids the failure mode where every panel
  shouts.
- Rhythmic panels are NOT throwaways — they carry the eye between
  dominants.
